# Tablesmit

Tablesmit is a minimalist, open source table builder for analytical writing. Build clean structured tables with full control over headers, column types, formatting, and export. No signup required. Free. MIT licensed.

## Core

- [Table Maker](/): Create and edit tables online
- [Features](/features): All table builder features
- [About](/about): About Tablesmit
- [Blog](/blog): Articles about tables, writing, and analytical thinking
- [Changelog](/changelog): Version history
- [Open Source](/open-source): Source code, contributors, and sponsorship
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): User feedback

## Export

- [PDF Export](/features/pdf-export)
- [Excel Export](/features/excel-export)
- [CSV Export](/features/csv-export)
- [LaTeX Export](/features/latex-export)
- [Image Export](/features/image-export)
- [Copy Table](/features/copy-table)
- [Markdown Table](/features/markdown-table)

## Import

- [CSV Import](/features/csv-import)
- [Excel Import](/features/excel-import)
- [Smart Paste](/features/smart-paste)

## Editing

- [Merge Cells](/features/merge-cells)
- [Column Sorting](/features/column-sorting)
- [Column Types](/features/column-types)
- [Table Themes](/features/table-themes)
- [Custom Headers](/features/custom-headers)
- [Drag to Resize](/features/drag-to-resize)
- [Freeze Panes](/features/freeze-panes)
- [Find and Replace](/features/find-replace)
- [Border Styles](/features/border-styles)
- [Table Caption](/features/table-caption)
- [Context Menu](/features/context-menu)
- [Auto Sum](/features/auto-sum)
- [Undo](/features/undo)
- [Table Templates](/features/templates)
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](/features/keyboard-shortcuts)
